LEGACY 12h RECERT: FAIL (TRUNCATED, 12<13 frames — did not reach 12 h)

================================================================================
AUTHORITATIVE CORRECTION (fail-closed re-verification via build_c4_evidence.py)
================================================================================
The "LEGACY 12h RECERT: FAIL (TRUNCATED, 12<13 frames)" line above is a FALSE
FAIL from a STALE frame-count gate in the orchestrator that ran (recert_nohup):
it hardcoded nf>=13, but this case's --history 60 + base history_interval_s=20
emits 12 hourly frames drifting +20s/frame (00:00:00 … 11:03:40); the 13th at
~12:04:00 falls PAST the 12:00:00 run end, so 12 IS the complete count. The
on-disk run_legacy12h_recert.sh is already corrected (cadence-independent gate;
completeness proven by the 12:00:00 SUCCESS marker, never by a frame threshold).

Both runs are genuinely COMPLETE and VERIFIED (independent fail-closed checks):
  mp37  = runs/mp37_recert12h_720min_hist60_np4_20260718_100124
  mp137 = runs/mp137_recert12h_720min_hist60_np4_20260718_110745
  - exit_code = 0 (both)
  - exactly 4 rank logs (rsl.error.0000..0003), all with SUCCESS COMPLETE WRF
  - master rank reached "_12:00:00 wrf: SUCCESS COMPLETE WRF" (both)
  - 0 fatal/NaN markers
  - history: 12 frames each, 00:00:00 … 11:03:40, file size 3814780628 B (equal)
  - disk 71 GB free at verification (no truncation)

Authoritative STRICT raw-bit (uint-view, zero tolerance) comparison, ALL frames:
  every one of the 12 common frames: 254 common vars, 253 BITWISE-MATCH,
  0 DIFFER, 1 non-numeric (Times, skipped); variable sets identical.

VERDICT (authoritative): LEGACY 12h x np4 37<->137 RECERT: STRICT BITWISE PASS.
The merged piacw pi_t fix (PR #26, 0b767e2) did NOT perturb legacy 37<->137 f32
raw-bit parity. Machine-readable proof: docs/c4_evidence_manifest.json ->
legacy_12h_np4_recertification.comparison.per_frame.
================================================================================

gate_d_bisection_verdict_2026_07_17.classification: legacy-SHARED latent class (not Case A / not Case B): same idiom already fixed for psacw/pgacw/paacw via path-conditional pi_t; piacw left on raw PI; invisible in legacy certifications (zero straddle flips), exposed by the variant's supercooled cloud-ice population
gate_d_bisection_verdict_2026_07_17.fix_adjudication_historical: piacw raw PI -> pi_t touches SHARED legacy C++ (outside the Case-A conservative-only pre-approval); provably moves legacy C++ piacw ONTO legacy Fortran; legacy re-cert scope required
